uplink.description: Status report: gang 1 open, gang 2 closed, battery 3.0 V
uplink._note: Upstream example input (status report). Upstream emits raw status1=1/status2=0 and Volt=3; we map gang 1 -> action.contactState 'open' and gang 2 -> contact2State 'closed', battery in volts.

uplink.description: Status report: both gangs closed, battery 3.0 V
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame, both gangs closed (status bytes 0/0). Confirmed against reference/upstream-codec.js (status1=0,status2=0,Volt=3).

uplink.description: Status report: gang 1 closed, gang 2 open, low battery flag set
uplink._note: Synthetic low-battery frame: byte3 0x9E has high bit set (low battery) and low 7 bits 0x1E = 30 -> 3.0 V. Confirmed against reference/upstream-codec.js (Volt='3(low battery)', status1=0, status2=1).
Upstream example input (startup version report, byte2=0x00). Carries SW/HW version + datecode, no measurement, so we report an error.

uplink.description: Configure report response on fPort 7 (no measurement)
uplink._note: Upstream example input (ConfigReportRsp). Configuration responses carry no measurement, so we report an error.
